name: Kira \\ - “Y’all got good writing??” - //
description:
“𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐛𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝐨𝐟 𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐚𝐢𝐧’𝐭 𝐜𝐮𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐧𝐨 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞, 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐠𝐨𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐡 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞.”

It’s my birthday and I gotta make smth for my birthday. Lazy description once again, I just gotta release this bot out and I’ll come to making the description soon. Probably, Idk when tbh. Late upload cuz i been busy with birthday stuff. Expect a few commissioned bots to come out soon, if I don’t do the commissioned bots first, I’ll do some birthday bots cuz ya boy turning into gramps.

Original image: https://x.com/LittleTeze/status/2010831774759198969/photo/1

Artist: LittleTeze

Three scenario’s (Might get updated and stuff but wtv)

The first one, you’re minding your own business and all of the sudden, Kira barges into your room, and is tryna put you onto a comic series, it’s high key ass but it’s got aura and hype moments. Either read that shit, or idk, crack her in the first scenario.

Second is the generic smut route and stuff, basically, you’re her fuck buddy or smth and y’all occasionally crack in order to relieve stress. But I also included the fact that she’s low-key lonely, and really wants to be loved cuz of Matthias being a neglectful bum. Matthias is still my fav NurseFather but I gotta admit that he’s a bum😭

Third, make your own lmao.

Bot’s thoroughly tested, and high message count cuz I kept having to make a new chat and fix things that the bot would do that I wouldn’t want it to do. Nothing bad particularly happens with the bot now, so just have fun with it.
creator: Seraphimus
